Uttar Pradesh Public Service Commission UPPSC has released the Recruitment Advt No : ADVT.NO.A-6/E-1/2025, G.I.C. AND SPARSH / Samekit Vishesh Madhyamik Schools Lecturer (Sociology, Economics, Civics, English, History, Hindi, Sanskrit) Candidate Those Are Enrolled with Vacancy Can Modify Application Form as per Schedule.. Read the notification for UPPSC Lecturer 2025 Exam, eligibility, Subject Details information, Document Required, age limit, How to Apply and all other information.
Uttar Pradesh Public Service Commission (UPPSC) UPPSC Govt. Inter College GIC Lecturer Recruitment 2025 UPPSC Advt No. : A-6/E-1/2025 : Short Details of Notification WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM

Important Dates Application Begin : 12/08/2025 Last Date for Apply Online : 12/09/2025 Pay Exam Fee Last Date : 12/09/2026 Correction / Modify Form Date : 17-27 March 2026 Exam Date : 14/06/2026 & 17/06/2026 Admit Card Available : Before Exam Answer Key Available : 18/06/2026 Sociology / Geography Result Available : 20/07/2026
Application Fee General / OBC / EWS : 125/- SC / ST  : 65/- PH (Divyang) : 25/- Pay the Exam Fee Through Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking or UPI Fee Mode Only.

UPPSC GIC Lecturer Recruitment 2025 : Age Limit as on 01/07/2025 Minimum Age : 21 Years Maximum Age : 40  Years UPPSC GIC Lecturer Recruitment A-6/E-1/2025 Age Relaxation Extra for Details Must Read the Notification.
UPPSC GIC Lecturer Recruitment 2025  : Vacancy Details Total : 1516  Post
Master Degree in Related Subject BED / Special B.Ed / M.Ed Degree Knowledge of Hindi / English Reading and Writing More & Subject Wise Eligibility Details Read the Notification
Pravakta Sparsh Dristhibadhit Govt Inter College / Samekit Vishesh Madhyamik Vidyalaya
Pradhyapak Uttar Pradesh Jail Parshikshan Vidyalaya

How to Fill UPPSC GIC Lecturer Recruitment Online Form 2026 Uttar Pradesh Public Service Commission UPPSC GIC Lecturer Recruitment 2025. Notification and Invited Online Application Form for the Latest UPPSC Jobs 2025 Candidate Can Apply Online for 12/08/2026 to 12/09/2026. Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the UPPSC Latest Recruitment 2025 Application Form in Sarkari Result Latest Job Section. Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Hand Writing, Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – Photo, Sign, ID, Thumb, Proof, Etc. Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed. Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form
Interested Candidates Can Read the Full Notification Before Apply Online.
